result.stdout:
USAGE:
    houston.dll [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information   
    -v, --version    Prints version information

COMMANDS:
    config                                                                      
    create env                                                                  
    create release                                                              
    create releases                                                             
    nano dashboard                                                              
    deploy                                                                      
    exec                                                                        
    nano instance log                                                           
    group deploy                                                                
    nano instance launch                                                        
    new                                                                         
    new ls                                                                      
    pack asset                                                                  
    pack                    Publishes and packs a project into a .nupkg file    
                            suitable for uploading to Houston.The only argument 
                            is a path to a project file (.csproj) in new .NET   
                            Core format to be packed.If omitted and current     
                            directory contains a single project, this project is
                            chosen implicitly                                   
    push asset              Push application binaries to Houston2               
    push binaries                                                               
    push                                                                        
    self diagnostic                                                             
    nano instance start                                                         
    nano start                                                                  
    nano instance stop                                                          
    nano stop                                                                   
    nano instance update                                                        
    version                 Prints currently installed version of the tool

    pack                    Publishes and packs a project into a .nupkg file    
                            suitable for uploading to Houston.The only argument 
                            is a path to a project file (.csproj) in new .NET   
                            Core format to be packed.If omitted and current     
                            directory contains a single project, this project is

    push asset              Push application binaries to Houston2

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    houston.dll deploy [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                     Prints help information                      
        --debug                                                                 
    -a, --api-token                Your houston2 API token                      
    -z, --cluster-config-zone      Cluster config zone for Api.Server connect.  
                                   Default: default                             
        --application              Application id or full name                  
                                   (<team>/<project>/<subproject>/<application>)
    -v, --version                  Version of release                           
        --previous-version         Previous version of release. Default: empty  
    -e, --environment              Target environment id or name                
    -s, --strategy                 Deploy strategy. Possible values: recreate,  
                                   rolling-update. Default: rolling update      
    -w, --wait                                                                  
    -t, --timeout                  Deploy timeout (like '30 seconds'). Default  
                                   is 30 minutes                                
        --dont-fail-on-rollback    Don't throw exception if deploy has been     
                                   roll-backed                                  
        --dont-fail-on-suspend     Don't throw exception if deploy has been     
                                   suspended                                    
        --created                  Group deployment created by

        --created                  Group deployment created by

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    houston.dll exec [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                   Prints help information                        
        --debug                                                                 
    -a, --api-token              Your houston2 API token                        
    -z, --cluster-config-zone    Cluster config zone for Api.Server connect.    
                                 Default: default                               
    -i, --instance               Instance identifier (a guid obtained from the  
                                 web interface or                               
                                 team/proj/subproj/app/env/instance name        
                                 sequence)                                      
    -c, --command                Command to execute. If omitted, starts a       
                                 pseudo-interactive session                     
    -t, --timeout                Command execution timeout (like '30 seconds'). 
                                 Default is 1 minute

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    houston.dll new [TEMPLATE] [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    [TEMPLATE]    Template name. List templates by 'new ls' command

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help               Prints help information                            
        --debug                                                                 
    -n, --name               New project name                                   
    -m, --package-manager    Package manager: cement, nuget. By default auto    
                             detected                                           
    -f, --framework          Framework

USAGE:
    houston.dll push [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                   Prints help information                        
        --debug

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    houston.dll push asset [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                   Prints help information                        
        --debug                                                                 
    -a, --api-token              Your houston2 API token                        
    -z, --cluster-config-zone    Cluster config zone for Api.Server connect.    
                                 Default: default                               
    -t, --team                   Your team id or name                           
        --name                   Asset name. By default, parsed from package    
                                 name                                           
    -v, --version                Asset version. By default, parsed from package 
                                 version                                        
    -p, --package-path           Package of asset path                          
        --description            Description of asset                           
    -o, --properties             Properties json or k1=v1,k2=v2 format for      
                                 uploaded asset                                 
        --created                Assets created or pushed by
